body_txt: A plot where an innocent person, usually a kid , is exposed to true evil, or the uglier and darker side of the world, for the first time, usually through being exploited by a criminal or suffering something traumatic like abuse or the loss of someone they love. However the story pans out, the character's innocence is gone forever by the end, with much regret by all involved. Compare Harmful to Minors , Defiled Forever , and Troubling Unchildlike Behavior . See also Coming of Age Story .
